zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe於大約1480年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，她的父親William Richard II Smythe31歲，母親Margaret Warde22歲。她於1499年與Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh.在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年1月9日在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe于大约1480年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，她的父亲William Richard II Smythe31岁，母亲Margaret Warde22岁。她于1499年与Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh.在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1550年1月9日在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年71岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Magdalen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older English form of Madeleine , usually pronounced ‘maud-lin’. This was the usual form of the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Magdelene
meanings: Older English form of Madeleine , usually pronounced ‘maud-lin’. This was the usual form of the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe was born about 1480, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, William Richard II Smythe, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Warde, was 22. She married Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. in 1499, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 9 January 1550, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe est née environ 1480, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, William Richard II Smythe, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Warde, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. en 1499, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1550, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe um 1480 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Richard II Smythe 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Warde 22. Sie hat 1499 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1550 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe è nata il circa 1480 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, William Richard II Smythe, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Warde, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. nel 1499, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1550, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Magdalen Margaret Smytheが約1480年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた時，父William Richard II Smytheは31歳，母Margaret Wardeは22歳であった。1499年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウでLord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1550年1月9日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで71歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe(이)가 대략 1480년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Richard II Smythe(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Warde(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 1월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Richard II Smythe, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Warde, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. em 1499, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1550, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe родилась около 1480 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Richard II Smythe было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Warde, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. в 1499 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 9 января 1550 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe nació aproximadamente 1480, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, William Richard II Smythe, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Warde, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. en 1499, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1550, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
